catalog_content:
Item Name: Sun Tropics Coconut Milk Rice Pudding Snack, Chocolate | Vegan Pudding, Dairy Free Pudding Snacks | Gluten Free, Low Sugar, Non-GMO | Ready-to-Eat Pudding Cups 8.46 Oz (Pack of 6)
Bullet Point 1: CREAMY COCONUT MILK RICE PUDDING - Creamy. Coconutty. Comforting. Whether you're looking for a midday pick-me-up or a sweet treat after dinner, Sun Tropics' coconut milk rice pudding is a perfect choice. Our original recipe combines creamy coconut milk, naturally sweet young Thai coconut, and fragrant Thai rice, all slowly simmered to a creamy and comforting perfection.
Bullet Point 2: DAIRY-FREE VEGAN PUDDING - Enjoy the rich and delicious taste of our coconut pudding without worrying about dairy or gluten. Sun Topics gluten-free, vegan, dairy free pudding snacks are made with wholesome and natural ingredients that still give it a creamy texture and natural sweetness- making it great for those with dietary restrictions.
Bullet Point 3: PACKED IN BPA-FREE SNACK CUPS - Our coconut milk rice pudding is packed in BPA-free snack pudding cups, making it easy to enjoy anytime and anywhere. Whether you prefer it chilled, warm, or at room temperature, our snack cups make it convenient for you to indulge in this comforting treat.
Bullet Point 4: HEALTHY SNACK OPTION - At Sun Tropics, we believe in healthy snacking that doesn't compromise on taste. Our coconut milk rice pudding is a classic favorite transformed into a tasty snack made with all-natural ingredients and free from artificial flavors, colors, and preservatives. It comes in three delicious, non-GMO and guilt-free snack flavor options including: Original Chocolate, and Cinnamon!
Bullet Point 5: Sun Tropics is a first generation Filipino-American family company committed to transforming childhood favorites and exotic fruits into shareable sweet and savory snacks, light desserts, tropical fruit juices and nectars, and authentic street food-inspired sauces and meal kits. The Sun Tropics founders and their team thrive on creating versatile ways to experience everyday meals, snacks and beverages, and on supporting Southeast Asian third-generation farmers, their families and communities.
Value: 50.76
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Vegan and gluten-free snack positioned as a healthy, natural alternative to traditional pudding. Non-GMO certification and BPA-free packaging suggest quality and safety focus. Pack of 6 cups indicates a bundle deal, likely offering value per unit. Mid-range pricing expected due to dietary claims and convenience packaging.
